memoryArtifacts.headline: BIO
memoryArtifacts.description:
BIO:  Count of Bar-le-Duc, 1105.  Opponent of the Emperor Henry V; Crusader; went with Louis VII on 2nd Crusade, 1147; founded the Priory of Moncon and the monestery at Rieval.

** from http://fmg.ac/ …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar於1077年出生在法國德 艾斯特姆斯巴勒迪克時，他的父親Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar32歲，母親Ermentrude de Bourgogne19歲。他於1120年之前與Gisèle de Vaudémont結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1149年3月10日在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒姆素享年72歲，埋葬在法國洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒姆素。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar于1077年出生在法国德 艾斯特姆斯巴勒迪克时，他的父亲Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar32岁，母亲Ermentrude de Bourgogne19岁。他于1120年之前与Gisèle de Vaudémont结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1149年3月10日在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒姆素享年72岁，埋葬在法国洛萊姆特-吉莫瑟勒姆素。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Moshe, Giora, Ilan, Arie, Eliahu, Hadassa, Haim, Menashe, Mordechai, Nadav, Nir, Noam.  French Dany, Francois, Henri.  German Hans, Gerhard, Willi.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber (see Baer 2).
German (Bär): variant of Baer 1 ‘bear’ and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this and of its cognate Bähr (see Bahr 2).

variants.name: Baer
meanings: German (also Bär): from Middle High German ber ‘bear’, a nickname for someone thought to resemble the animal in some way, a metonymic occupational name for someone who kept a performing bear, or a topographic or habitational name referring to a house distinguished by the sign of a bear. In some cases it may derive from a personal name containing this element. Compare Bar 2.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; also Bär): from the Yiddish male personal name Ber, from Yiddish ber ‘bear’. Compare Bar 1.
Germanized form (also Bär) of Sorbian Běr: see Bar 3.

variants.name: Dubar
meanings: French (mainly Nord): habitational name, with fused preposition and definite article du ‘from the’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

variants.name: Debar
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Laurent, Pierre.
French: habitational name, with fused preposition de ‘from’, denoting someone from any of several places called Bar (see Bar ).

nameMeanings.name: Renaud
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from Yiddish ber ‘bear’, probably influenced by the early medieval European practice of giving animal names to people. It is often paired with Dov in order to provide a Hebrew name in certain rituals.

nameMeanings.name: 'le
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Lewis   or respelling of   Lou  , as borne by the impresario  Lew Grade  (  1906–98 , originally  Louis Winogradsky ).

nameMeanings.name: Borgne'
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian: nickname from northern dialect borgna, feminine of borgno ‘blind in one eye’ (from French borgne). This surname is also found in southern France.

en.lifeSummary: When Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar was born in 1077, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Grand Est, France, his father, Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar, was 32 and his mother, Ermentrude de Bourgogne, was 19. He married Gisèle de Vaudémont before 1120. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 10 March 1149, in Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, at the age of 72, and was buried in Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar est né en 1077, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Grand Est, France, son père, Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ermentrude de Bourgogne, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Gisèle de Vaudémont avant 1120. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 10 mars 1149, à Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar 1077 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Großer Osten, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar 32 und seine Mutter Ermentrude de Bourgogne 19. Er hat vor 1120 Gisèle de Vaudémont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 10. März 1149 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich und wurde in Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lothringen, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar è nato il nel 1077 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia, il suo padre, Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Ermentrude de Bourgogne, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Gisèle de Vaudémont prima del 1120. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 10 marzo 1149, nel Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Barが1077年にフランスグランド エストメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Barは32歳，母Ermentrude de Bourgogneは19歳であった。1120年以前にGisèle de Vaudémontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1149年3月10日にフランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルモウソンで72歳で死去し，フランスロレィヌメウルスエ-エト-モセルモウソンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar(이)가 1077년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Ermentrude de Bourgogne(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1120년 이전 Gisèle de Vaudémont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1149년 3월 10일 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 모우슨에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 로레이인 우르테-트-모셀 모우슨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar nasceu em 1077, em Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Grand Est, França, seu pai, Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Ermentrude de Bourgogne, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Gisèle de Vaudémont antes 1120. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de março de 1149, em Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar родился в 1077 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, гранд эст, Франция, его отцу по имени Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ermentrude de Bourgogne, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Gisèle de Vaudémont перед 1120 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 10 марта 1149 г. в местности муссон, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности муссон, меурте-ет-моселл, лорреаин, Франция.

sm.1105-1149: mai le 1105 e o'o I le 1149
sm.1105-1134: mai le 1105 e o'o I le 1134

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Renaud Ier 'le Borgne' de Bar nació en 1077, en Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Grand Est, Francia, su papá, Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Ermentrude de Bourgogne, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Gisèle de Vaudémont antes de 1120. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 10 de marzo de 1149, en Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Mousson, Meurthe-et-Moselle, Lorraine, Francia.
